ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_scheme" TEXT /* Scheme of the season (e.g., single-elimination, round-robin) */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Prize pool for the season */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., singles, clans) */,
  "game_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modeConfigs" (
  "game_mode_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode configuration */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_formats" (
  "match_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match format */,
  "match_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the match format (e.g., single-elimination, round-robin) */,
  "match_format_description" TEXT /* Description of the match format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_tag" TEXT /* Tag of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Leader of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_description" TEXT /* Description of the player */,
  "player_avatar" TEXT /* Avatar of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_teams" (
  "season_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season-team pair */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_players" (
  "season_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season-player pair */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_description" TEXT /* Description of the match */,
  "match_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match format */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_schedules" (
  "match_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match schedule */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_details" (
  "match_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match detail */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Match format of the match */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "match_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 2-1, 1-0) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Details of the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "team_roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team roster */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_roster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-stat pair */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-stat pair */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_awards" (
  "season_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_brackets" (
  "tournament_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament bracket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team leader, player) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
